# Cem Horas - React Native Expo App

## Project Overview
React Native Expo mobile application for iOS and Android integration with Soffia API.
POC focused on login/logout functionality with the Plantão Ativo API.

## Completed Features
- [x] Project scaffolding with React Native Expo
- [x] Authentication system with Context API
- [x] Secure storage for tokens and user data
- [x] Login screen with form validation
- [x] Home screen with user info display
- [x] Soffia API integration service
- [x] Navigation system with React Navigation
- [x] Error handling and loading states
- [x] TypeScript ready structure

## API Integration
- Login: `https://api.plantaoativo.com/auth/login`
- Logout: `https://api.plantaoativo.com/auth/logout`
- Headers: Accept-Version 2.0, Origin: web.soffia.co

## Development Status
✅ Ready for testing - Development server running on Expo
📱 QR Code available for device testing with Expo Go app
